name: site-spec
description: Extract buildable website specifications through Chrome DevTools Protocol.

scripts.check: node --check src/extract.mjs && node --check src/capture-compaction.mjs && node --check src/drag-probe.mjs && node --check src/drag-runtime.mjs && node --check src/evidence-filter.mjs && node --check src/iframe-probe.mjs && node --check src/iframe-runtime.mjs && node --check src/lifecycle-recorder.js && node --check src/virtual-list-probe.mjs && node --check src/webgl-probe.mjs && node --check src/webgl-runtime.mjs && node --check build-static.mjs
